assertions.title: Prepared-slip confirmation still triggers canonical downstream posting

steps.action: Verify the canonical route remains sales-owned at the HTTP boundary
steps.expected: The surviving dispatch confirm owner is the sales route, not the factory surface.
steps.observed: The runtime auth probe reached business validation on POST /api/v1/sales/dispatch/confirm for the sales actor (400 VAL_001 on missing transporter/driver fields) while the factory actor was denied with 403 AUTH_004.

steps.action: Review the targeted dispatch-posting regression suites
steps.expected: Canonical dispatch confirmation still reduces FG stock and posts invoice/accounting/COGS/linkage truth.
steps.observed: DispatchConfirmationIT passed both cases; TS_O2CDispatchCanonicalPostingTest passed `confirmDispatchUsesLockingAndCanonicalFacadePosting`, `cogsPostingPrecedesArPostingAndPersistsLinkage`, and `dispatchFlowAvoidsDirectAccountingServicePosting`; OrderFulfillmentE2ETest passed `dispatch_CreatesPackingSlip_Invoice_PostsCOGS`, `dispatchConfirm_idempotent_andRestoresArtifacts`, and `salesDispatchEndpoint_isIdempotent`, with surefire logs showing consolidated COGS journals and sales journals being posted.

assertions.title: Recovery and orchestrator paths remain non-owners

steps.expected: Recovery and orchestrator seams must fail closed without alternate dispatch posting behavior.
Shared workflow guards still point dispatch ownership to the canonical sales path only.
steps.observed: guard_workflow_canonical_paths.sh completed successfully and reported `verified canonical dispatch source path` during the contract-guard run.

assertions.title: Automatic cross-module consequences stay aligned through batch -> pack -> dispatch

steps.action: Review end-to-end dispatch tests that include pack-to-dispatch handoff and posting evidence
steps.expected: Packed output should dispatch through the canonical route with aligned inventory/accounting consequences and no half-updated sibling state.
steps.observed: DispatchOperationalBoundaryIT passed `packedSellableOutput_mustExistBeforeOrderCanDispatch` and logged pack journals before dispatch-side COGS and sales journals; OrderFulfillmentE2ETest passed idempotent and COGS/invoice dispatch cases; ErpInvariantsSuiteIT passed `orderToCash_goldenPath`, `orderToCash_creditNoteReversesInvoice`, and `crossModule_tenantOnboardingFirstSaleProducesBalancedLinkedArtifacts`, all with COGS and sales journal output in the surefire logs.

steps.expected: Dispatch posting should remain on the canonical sales/accounting path with replay safety.
steps.observed: TS_O2CDispatchCanonicalPostingTest and OrderFulfillmentE2ETest both passed replay/canonical posting cases, while the runtime route probe kept the factory actor from acting as an alternate owner.

assertions.title: Packed sellable output is the only dispatchable handoff

steps.expected: Only packed sellable output should become dispatchable; unpacked output must fail closed.
steps.observed: DispatchOperationalBoundaryIT passed `packedSellableOutput_mustExistBeforeOrderCanDispatch`, which proves packing journals occur before dispatch posting and that packed sellable output is required for dispatch.

steps.action: Corroborate the broader end-to-end dispatch suites
steps.expected: The surviving dispatch flow should stay on packed sellable FG only with replay-safe canonical posting.
steps.observed: OrderFulfillmentE2ETest passed `dispatch_CreatesPackingSlip_Invoice_PostsCOGS` and `salesDispatchEndpoint_isIdempotent`, showing the surviving sales-owned dispatch flow operates on the finished-goods handoff only.
